body_transformation: Scyther's rounded head retains its pointed ears but now features soft petal-like ear flaps with a subtle shimmer, while pale cream accents transform into delicate lavender streaks. The compact dragon-like body gains a soft rounded contour with no sharp edges, covered in fine ivory-white scales that shimmer like dewdrops. Its translucent insect wings evolve into delicate crystalline wings with glowing starlight silver veins, maintaining the curved edge but now refracting light softly. The curled tail tip becomes a smooth spiral of soft pastel pink, adorned with tiny glowing starlight silver specks, while the short stubby legs now end in small delicate hoof pads instead of claws.
signature_feature: Wings: crystalline with glowing starlight silver veins and refractive light patterns.
